spec.rawSql:
SELECT time, title, text FROM (
  SELECT min(timestamp) AS time, concat(agent_name, ' -> ', agent_version) AS title, 'agent version' AS text
  FROM agent_usage WHERE agent_name != '' AND agent_version != '' GROUP BY agent_name, agent_version
  UNION ALL
  SELECT min(timestamp) AS time, concat(skill_name, ' -> ', skill_version) AS title, 'skill version' AS text
  FROM agent_usage WHERE skill_name != '' AND skill_version != '' GROUP BY skill_name, skill_version
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens over time (input vs output)
spec.description: Input/output token volume over time across all users/agents currently selected by the dashboard variables (narrow to a specific user via the user_id filter if needed - no need for a permanent per-user split here).

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens))) AS input,
  sum(u.output_tokens) AS output
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cost over time (input vs output)
spec.description: input_cost already bundles cache-read/cache-write pricing (LiteLLM prices those tiers within the input side) - there is deliberately no separate cache-cost series, see the agent_usage table comment in clickhouse/schema.sql explaining why a manual cache price table was removed after it overcounted cost.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  sum(u.input_cost) AS input,
  sum(u.output_cost) AS output
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens by agent/version over time
spec.description: Input/output tokens over time per agent name+version (main-session calls bucketed as 'main agent'). Lets a new agent version be compared against its predecessor's token footprint.

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    if(u.agent_name = '', 'main agent', if(u.agent_version = '', u.agent_name, concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version))) AS metric,
    sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens))) AS in_val,
    sum(u.output_tokens) AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (u.agent_name != '' OR u.skill_name = '')
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
  GROUP BY time, metric
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

    sum(u.input_cost) AS in_val,
    sum(u.output_cost) AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
  GROUP BY time, metric
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache hit rate by agent/skill/model over time
spec.description: Share of calls with cache_hit=1 over time, by agent/skill/model - shows whether prompt caching is actually landing for a given agent, skill, or model, and whether that's improving or regressing.

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    concat(multiIf(agent_name != '', 'subagent', skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', model) AS metric,
    sum(cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read,
    sum(input_tokens) AS input_tok
  FROM agent_usage
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_usage.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_usage.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name))

FROM filtered
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Spend by user

spec.rawSql:

  u.user_id,
  any(usr.user_name) AS user_name,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS tokens
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT user_id, argMax(user_name, updated_at) AS user_name
  FROM ai_gateway_users
  GROUP BY user_id
) usr ON usr.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo

) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))

spec.title: Top 10 users by tokens
spec.description: The 10 users with the highest total token usage in the selected time range, ranked bar - the token counterpart to 'Spend by user'.

spec.rawSql:
WITH session_durations_period AS (
  SELECT session_id, user_id, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  GROUP BY session_id, user_id
),
user_duration_period AS (
  SELECT user_id, sum(duration_s) AS duration_s FROM session_durations_period GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT
  u.user_id,
  any(usr.user_name) AS user_name,
  sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens))) AS tokens_in,
  sum(u.output_tokens) AS tokens_out,
  sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS total_tokens,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  any(udp.duration_s) AS session_duration_period_s
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN user_duration_period udp ON udp.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT user_id, argMax(user_name, updated_at) AS user_name

  GROUP BY user_id
) usr ON usr.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo

  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY u.user_id
ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Active users & sessions
spec.description: 7-day rolling average of daily active users/sessions, bucketed by calendar day regardless of the Window variable, over whatever time range/filters are currently selected.

spec.rawSql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS time,
    uniqExact(user_id) AS users_day,
    uniqExact(session_id) AS sessions_day
  FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)))
  GROUP BY time
)
SELECT
  time,
  avg(sessions_day) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS sessions,
  avg(users_day) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS users
FROM daily
ORDER BY time

      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)))
ORDER BY latency_ms DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Error rate trend by tool
spec.description: Same metric as 'Error rate by tool_name' but as a trend over time instead of a single aggregate, so a reliability regression on one tool can be spotted as it happens.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  tool_name AS metric,
  countIf(status = 'failure') / nullIf(countIf(status IN ('success', 'failure')), 0) AS value
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Full trace of selected session(s) - click the magnifier on prompt/response/raw_payload to see full text
spec.description: Requires an explicit, partial session selection - returns nothing when 0 or literally all available sessions are selected, since either means "no real filter" and would otherwise pull every raw_payload in the table.

spec.rawSql:
WITH selected_session_count AS (
  SELECT count() AS n FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([${session_id:singlequote}]) AS s) WHERE s != ''
),
available_session_count AS (
  SELECT countDistinct(session_id) AS n FROM agent_events WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
)
SELECT
  ev.user_id,
  usr.user_name AS user_name,
  ev.session_id,
  ev.turn_id,
  ev.timestamp,
  ev.event_type,
  ev.tool_name,
  substring(ev.calculated_payload, 1, 300) AS tool_detail,
  ev.agent_name,
  ev.agent_version,
  ev.skill_name,
  ev.skill_version,
  ev.status,
  ev.latency_ms,
  m.prompt_text,
  m.response_text,
  es.raw_payload_full AS raw_payload
FROM agent_events ev
LEFT JOIN agent_messages m
  ON m.session_id = ev.session_id AND m.litellm_call_id = ev.litellm_call_id
LEFT JOIN event_sources es ON es.litellm_call_id = ev.litellm_call_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT user_id, argMax(user_name, updated_at) AS user_name
  FROM ai_gateway_users
  GROUP BY user_id
) usr ON usr.user_id = ev.user_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = ev.session_id
WHERE (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], ev.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR ev.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], ev.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], ev.group_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], ev.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], ev.skill_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(ev.tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], ev.tool_name)))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], ev.command_name))
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) > 0
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) < (SELECT n FROM available_session_count)
ORDER BY ev.session_id, ev.turn_id ASC

spec.title: Call stack for selected session(s)
spec.description: Requires an explicit, partial session selection - returns nothing when 0 or literally all available sessions are selected, since either means "no real filter" and would otherwise pull every call across every session at once.

spec.rawSql:
WITH selected_session_count AS (
  SELECT count() AS n FROM (SELECT arrayJoin([${session_id:singlequote}]) AS s) WHERE s != ''
),
available_session_count AS (
  SELECT countDistinct(session_id) AS n FROM agent_events WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
),
usage_by_call AS (
  SELECT u.session_id, u.litellm_call_id,
    sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS tok,
    sum(u.cost) AS cost
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
    AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) > 0
    AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) < (SELECT n FROM available_session_count)
  GROUP BY u.session_id, u.litellm_call_id
)
SELECT
  ev.timestamp AS time,
  ev.session_id AS session_id,
  concat(
    if(ev.agent_name != '', concat('[', ev.agent_name, if(ev.agent_version != '', concat(' v', ev.agent_version), ''), '] '), ''),
    if(ev.command_name != '', concat('/', ev.command_name, ' '), ''),
    if(ev.skill_name != '', concat('(', ev.skill_name, if(ev.skill_version != '', concat(' v', ev.skill_version), ''), ') '), ''),
    if(ev.tool_name = '', 'reply', concat(
      ev.tool_name,
      ' `', substring(replaceRegexpAll(ev.calculated_payload, '\\s+', ' '), 1, 70), '`'
    )),
    if(ev.status = 'failure', ' [FAIL]', ''),
    if(ev.latency_ms IS NOT NULL, concat(' - ', toString(ev.latency_ms), 'ms'), ''),
    if(u.tok > 0, concat(' - ', toString(u.tok), ' tok - $', toString(round(u.cost, 4))), '')
  ) AS call,
  es.raw_payload_full AS raw_payload
FROM agent_events ev
LEFT JOIN usage_by_call u ON u.session_id = ev.session_id AND u.litellm_call_id = ev.litellm_call_id
LEFT JOIN event_sources es ON es.litellm_call_id = ev.litellm_call_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = ev.session_id
WHERE (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], ev.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], ev.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], ev.group_id))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], ev.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], ev.skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], ev.command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(ev.tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], ev.tool_name)))
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) > 0
  AND (SELECT n FROM selected_session_count) < (SELECT n FROM available_session_count)
ORDER BY ev.session_id, ev.timestamp

spec.title: Top 10 most expensive sessions
spec.description: The 10 sessions with the highest total cost in the selected time range - a quick way to find outlier sessions worth inspecting in the Sessions & Debugging tab.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  u.session_id,
  u.user_id,
  any(usr.user_name) AS user_name,
  any(ev.started_at) AS started_at,
  sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS tokens,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  any(ev.duration_s) AS duration_s,
  arrayStringConcat(groupUniqArray(u.model), ', ') AS models
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, min(timestamp) AS started_at, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  GROUP BY session_id
) ev ON u.session_id = ev.session_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT user_id, argMax(user_name, updated_at) AS user_name
  FROM ai_gateway_users
  GROUP BY user_id
) usr ON usr.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY u.session_id, u.user_id
ORDER BY cost DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Agent version-change impact (before vs after adopting current version)
spec.description: Empty until an agent/skill actually has 2+ distinct versions observed in agent_usage - by design, this shows nothing for a brand-new agent/skill on its first version. Not a query bug.

spec.rawSql:
WITH usage_f AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM agent_usage
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_usage.session_id
WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id)) AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_usage.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name))
),
events_f AS (
  SELECT * FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
    AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)))
),
version_starts AS (
  SELECT agent_name, agent_version, min(timestamp) AS started_at
  FROM usage_f
  WHERE agent_name != ''
  GROUP BY agent_name, agent_version
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT *,
    lagInFrame(agent_version) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_version,
    lagInFrame(started_at) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_started_at,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at DESC) AS rn
  FROM version_starts
),
transitions AS (
  SELECT agent_name, agent_version AS current_version, started_at, prev_version, prev_started_at
  FROM ordered
  WHERE rn = 1 AND prev_version != ''
),
usage_after AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at,
    avgIf((uf.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (uf.cache_creation_tokens + uf.cache_read_tokens)) + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_tokens_after,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_cost_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.agent_name = t.agent_name AND uf.agent_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at
),
usage_before AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    avgIf((uf.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (uf.cache_creation_tokens + uf.cache_read_tokens)) + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_tokens_before,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_cost_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.agent_name = t.agent_name AND uf.agent_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
),
events_after AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at), 0) AS error_rate_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.agent_name = t.agent_name AND ev.agent_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
),
events_before AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at), 0) AS error_rate_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.agent_name = t.agent_name AND ev.agent_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
)
SELECT
  ua.agent_name, ua.prev_version, ua.current_version, ua.started_at,
  ub.avg_tokens_before, ua.avg_tokens_after,
  ub.avg_cost_before, ua.avg_cost_after,
  eb.error_rate_before, ea.error_rate_after
FROM usage_after ua
LEFT JOIN usage_before ub ON ub.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND ub.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_after ea ON ea.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND ea.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_before eb ON eb.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND eb.current_version = ua.current_version
ORDER BY ua.agent_name

spec.title: Skill version-change impact (before vs after adopting current version)
spec.description: Empty until an agent/skill actually has 2+ distinct versions observed in agent_usage - by design, this shows nothing for a brand-new agent/skill on its first version. Not a query bug.

spec.rawSql:
WITH usage_f AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM agent_usage
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_usage.session_id
WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id)) AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_usage.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name))
),
events_f AS (
  SELECT * FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
    AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)))
),
version_starts AS (
  SELECT skill_name, skill_version, min(timestamp) AS started_at
  FROM usage_f
  WHERE skill_name != ''
  GROUP BY skill_name, skill_version
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT *,
    lagInFrame(skill_version) OVER (PARTITION BY skill_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_version,
    lagInFrame(started_at) OVER (PARTITION BY skill_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_started_at,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY skill_name ORDER BY started_at DESC) AS rn
  FROM version_starts
),
transitions AS (
  SELECT skill_name, skill_version AS current_version, started_at, prev_version, prev_started_at
  FROM ordered
  WHERE rn = 1 AND prev_version != ''
),
usage_after AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at,
    avgIf((uf.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (uf.cache_creation_tokens + uf.cache_read_tokens)) + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_tokens_after,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_cost_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.skill_name = t.skill_name AND uf.skill_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at
),
usage_before AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version,
    avgIf((uf.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (uf.cache_creation_tokens + uf.cache_read_tokens)) + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_tokens_before,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_cost_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.skill_name = t.skill_name AND uf.skill_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version
),
events_after AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at), 0) AS error_rate_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.skill_name = t.skill_name AND ev.skill_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version
),
events_before AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at), 0) AS error_rate_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.skill_name = t.skill_name AND ev.skill_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version
)
SELECT
  ua.skill_name, ua.prev_version, ua.current_version, ua.started_at,
  ub.avg_tokens_before, ua.avg_tokens_after,
  ub.avg_cost_before, ua.avg_cost_after,
  eb.error_rate_before, ea.error_rate_after
FROM usage_after ua
LEFT JOIN usage_before ub ON ub.skill_name = ua.skill_name AND ub.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_after ea ON ea.skill_name = ua.skill_name AND ea.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_before eb ON eb.skill_name = ua.skill_name AND eb.current_version = ua.current_version
ORDER BY ua.skill_name

spec.title: Tokens by user
spec.description: Token totals per user over the selected time range/filters, bucketed by the Window variable.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  coalesce(any(usr.user_name), u.user_id) AS metric,
  sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT user_id, argMax(user_name, updated_at) AS user_name
  FROM ai_gateway_users
  GROUP BY user_id
) usr ON usr.user_id = u.user_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))

  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, u.user_id
ORDER BY time
