spec.title: Tokens by command over time
spec.description: Input/output tokens over time per slash command (command_name) - shows which commands are the heaviest token consumers and whether that's changing.

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    command_name AS metric,
    sum((input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (cache_creation_tokens + cache_read_tokens))) AS in_val,
    sum(output_tokens) AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_usage.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND command_name != ''
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_usage.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name))
  GROUP BY time, metric
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cost by command over time
spec.description: Spend (USD) over time per slash command - the cost counterpart to 'Tokens by command over time'.

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    u.command_name AS metric,
    sum(u.input_cost) AS in_val,
    sum(u.output_cost) AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND u.command_name != ''
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
    AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
  GROUP BY time, metric
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Failed tool calls
spec.description: Tool executions that returned an error (tool_result is_error=true), not LLM-API-level failures (those never carry a tool_name - see agent_events.status). Recovered from "messages" at ingest time only, so this has no historical backfill - only shows failures from calls ingested after this panel was added.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp,
  user_id,
  session_id,
  failed_tool_name AS tool_name,
  failed_tool_args AS arguments,
  failed_tool_error AS error
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND failed_tool_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(failed_tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], failed_tool_name)))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.title: Tokens per call by agent/version (bloat detector)
spec.description: Goal: catch a prompt/tool-set regression that makes an agent version 'heavier' per call even if total volume looks flat. How it works: averages input+output tokens per litellm_call, bucketed by day, per agent name+version - a rising line for the same agent means each individual call is getting more expensive, not just more frequent.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(u.agent_name = '', 'main agent', if(u.agent_version = '', u.agent_name, concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version))) AS metric,
  avg((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (u.agent_name != '' OR u.skill_name = '')
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens per call by skill/version (bloat detector)
spec.description: Goal: same regression-detector as 'Tokens per call by agent/version', but for skills, since a skill's own instructions/examples can grow independently of the agent that invokes it. How it works: averages input+output tokens per litellm_call, bucketed by day, per skill name+version.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(u.skill_version = '', u.skill_name, concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)) AS metric,
  avg((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND u.skill_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Prompt/response length by agent & skill (verbosity trend)
spec.description: Goal: an early-warning signal for token bloat - text length grows before it shows up as a token-count regression, and it's readable without knowing model-specific tokenization. How it works: averages character length of agent_messages.prompt_text/response_text per day, grouped by skill (or agent when no skill applies).

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    if(skill_name = '', if(agent_name = '', 'main agent', agent_name), skill_name) AS metric,
    length(prompt_text) AS prompt_len,
    length(response_text) AS response_len
  FROM agent_messages
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_messages.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_messages.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_messages.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time, concat(metric, ' prompt chars') AS metric, avg(prompt_len) AS value FROM filtered GROUP BY time, metric
  UNION ALL
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time, concat(metric, ' response chars') AS metric, avg(response_len) AS value FROM filtered GROUP BY time, metric
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache efficiency ratio by agent/skill
spec.description: Goal: distinguish 'caching happened at all' (existing cache-hit-rate panel) from 'how much of the prompt was actually served from cache', which is what determines the dollar savings. How it works: cache_read_tokens / input_tokens (input_tokens already includes cache_read + cache_creation), per day, per agent (or skill when no agent applies).

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(u.agent_name = '', if(u.skill_name = '', 'main agent', u.skill_name), u.agent_name) AS metric,
  sum(u.cache_read_tokens) / nullIf(sum(u.input_tokens), 0) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache savings, $ (saved_cache_cost)
spec.description: Goal: show prompt-caching payoff in the unit that actually matters - dollars, not tokens - since cache read/write tiers are priced differently and a token ratio alone doesn't say whether caching is worth it. How it works: sums LiteLLM's own saved_cache_cost field (extracted from agent_events.raw_payload, not a stored column) per day, per agent (or skill).

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(agent_name = '', if(skill_name = '', 'main agent', skill_name), agent_name) AS metric,
  sum(JSONExtractFloat(es.raw_payload_full, 'saved_cache_cost')) AS value
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN event_sources es ON es.litellm_call_id = agent_events.litellm_call_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: TTFT (time to first token) p50/p95 by model
spec.description: Goal: track model responsiveness (how long before the model starts streaming) separately from total call duration, which 'Latency percentiles by tool_name' already covers. How it works: p50/p95 of agent_usage.ttft_ms (completionStartTime - startTime), bucketed by day, per model.

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT u.timestamp AS time, u.model AS metric, u.ttft_ms AS ttft_ms
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp) AND u.ttft_ms > 0
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time, concat(metric, ' p50') AS metric, quantile(0.5)(ttft_ms) AS value FROM filtered GROUP BY time, metric
  UNION ALL
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time, concat(metric, ' p95') AS metric, quantile(0.95)(ttft_ms) AS value FROM filtered GROUP BY time, metric
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Stop-reason mix over time
spec.description: Goal: catch two failure modes that a plain error-rate panel misses because the call still counts as 'success' - answers getting cut off (max_tokens) or refused (refusal) instead of ending in a clean tool_calls/stop. How it works: stacked count of agent_usage.stop_reason per day.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  u.stop_reason AS metric,
  count() AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp) AND u.stop_reason != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Retry / self-correction rate by agent & skill
spec.description: Goal: a direct quality signal for a skill/prompt - how often the model has to react to its own failed tool call, versus succeeding cleanly the first time. How it works: share of agent_events rows where failed_tool_name != '' (this call is responding to a tool_result marked is_error), per day, per agent (or skill).

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(agent_name = '', if(skill_name = '', 'main agent', skill_name), agent_name) AS metric,
  countIf(failed_tool_name != '') / nullIf(count(), 0) AS value
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: API-level failure reasons over time
spec.description: Goal: tell platform-level failures (rate limits, overload, auth) apart from tool-execution failures, which 'Failed tool calls'/'Error rate by tool_name' already cover - those never carry a tool_name since the call failed before any tool ran. How it works: stacked count of agent_events rows with status='failure', grouped by error_str.error.type extracted from raw_payload, per day.

spec.rawSql:
WITH failures AS (
  SELECT timestamp, es.raw_payload_full AS raw_payload
  FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN event_sources es ON es.litellm_call_id = agent_events.litellm_call_id
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND status = 'failure'
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  if(JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'error_str', 'error', 'type') = '', 'unknown', JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'error_str', 'error', 'type')) AS metric,
  count() AS value
FROM failures
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Top repeating tool errors
spec.description: Goal: 'Failed tool calls' lists individual failures - this instead groups them, so a single misbehaving tool call pattern (bad args, flaky dependency) shows up as one row with a count instead of 20 identical-looking entries. How it works: groups agent_events by failed_tool_name + the first 80 characters of failed_tool_error, ranked by occurrence count.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  failed_tool_name AS tool_name,
  substring(failed_tool_error, 1, 80) AS error_excerpt,
  count() AS occurrences,
  max(timestamp) AS last_seen
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND failed_tool_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
  AND (NOT startsWith(failed_tool_name, 'mcp__') OR (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], failed_tool_name)))
GROUP BY tool_name, error_excerpt
ORDER BY occurrences DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.title: Command adoption
spec.description: Goal: see which slash commands actually got adopted versus shipped-but-unused, which the existing token/cost-by-command trend panels don't answer directly. How it works: one row per command_name with call count, distinct session count, and first/last-seen timestamps, ranked by call count.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  command_name,
  count() AS calls,
  count(distinct session_id) AS sessions,
  min(timestamp) AS first_seen,
  max(timestamp) AS last_seen
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND command_name != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
GROUP BY command_name
ORDER BY calls DESC

spec.title: Subagent spawns over time by type
spec.description: Goal: catch an orchestrator/prompt change that starts spawning more (or fewer) subagents than before - a fan-out regression that token/cost panels only show indirectly. How it works: counts agent_invocations rows (one per Agent tool_use recovered from the orchestrator's own messages) per day, per subagent_type, joined to agent_events on session_id so the existing user/agent/skill/command filters still apply.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(ai.spawned_at, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  replaceRegexpOne(ai.subagent_type, '_(v[0-9][0-9.]*)$', ' \\1') AS metric,
  count() AS value
FROM agent_invocations ai
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT session_id, user_id
  FROM agent_events
  WHERE (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
    AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], agent_name))
    AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], skill_name))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], command_name))
) ev ON ev.session_id = ai.session_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = ai.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(ai.spawned_at)
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], ai.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR ai.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Session cost distribution
spec.description: Goal: 'Top 10 most expensive sessions' shows the outlier tail - this shows the overall shape, so it's possible to tell 'most sessions are cheap with a couple of expensive outliers' apart from 'costs are broadly high across the board'. How it works: histogram of total cost per session_id (agent_usage.cost summed per session) over the selected time range.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT session_id, sum(cost) AS total_cost
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY session_id

spec.title: Spend by branch
spec.description: Total spend (USD) per git branch over the selected time range - a single ranked bar per branch, mirroring 'Spend by user' but for 'which branch is costing the most.'

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  coalesce(nullIf(gb.git_branch, ''), '(none - no branch captured)') AS git_branch,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS tokens
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY git_branch
ORDER BY cost DESC

spec.title: Cost over time by branch
spec.description: Spend (USD) over time, one series per git branch - shows when a branch's work happened and whether spend is trending up or tapering off, not just the totals.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  coalesce(nullIf(gb.git_branch, ''), '(none - no branch captured)') AS metric,
  sum(u.cost) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Sessions by branch
spec.description: Distinct session count per git branch over the selected time range - which branches are actually being worked in, as opposed to which cost the most.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  coalesce(nullIf(gb.git_branch, ''), '(none - no branch captured)') AS git_branch,
  count(DISTINCT u.session_id) AS sessions
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY git_branch
ORDER BY sessions DESC

spec.title: Tokens by branch
spec.description: Total input+output tokens per git branch over the selected time range - a companion to spend: a branch can be token-heavy but cheap on a cache-friendly model, or vice versa.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  coalesce(nullIf(gb.git_branch, ''), '(none - no branch captured)') AS git_branch,
  sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS tokens,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY git_branch
ORDER BY tokens DESC

spec.title: Cost by subagent type over time
spec.description: Goal: see which subagent types (script-ops, clickhouse-analyst, etc) actually drive spend. How it works: joins agent_usage.agent_invocation_id to agent_invocations.agent_id (the subagent-id -> subagent_type lookup) - this is the same join key already used elsewhere in the schema but not previously wired into any panel, so this cost was invisible before.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  ai.subagent_type AS metric,
  sum(u.cost) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
INNER JOIN agent_invocations ai ON ai.agent_id = u.agent_invocation_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id

spec.title: Tokens by subagent type over time

spec.rawSql:
SELECT

  ai.subagent_type AS metric,
  sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
INNER JOIN agent_invocations ai ON ai.agent_id = u.agent_invocation_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND u.agent_invocation_id != ''
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))

INNER JOIN agent_invocations ai ON ai.agent_id = u.agent_invocation_id

spec.title: Subagent call outcome by type (success/failure)

  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo

spec.title: Cache creation tokens by TTL (1h vs 5m)
spec.description: Goal: see how much prompt-cache writing goes to the cheaper-but-longer-lived 1h tier vs the 5m tier that expires between widely-spaced requests. A rising 5m share usually means requests are landing far enough apart that the longer cache window isn't being reused.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    'ephemeral 1h' AS metric,
    sum(u.cache_creation_1h_tokens) AS value
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
    FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
  ) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
    AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  GROUP BY time
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
    'ephemeral 5m' AS metric,
    sum(u.cache_creation_5m_tokens) AS value
  FROM agent_usage u
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
    FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
  ) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
    AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
    AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
    AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
    AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  GROUP BY time
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache hit rate over time (overall)
spec.description: cache_read_tokens / input_tokens (input_tokens already includes cache_read + cache_creation), aggregated across all agents/skills/models currently selected - the project-wide version of the per-agent/skill/model breakdown in 'Cache hit rate by agent/skill/model over time'.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  sum(u.cache_read_tokens) / nullIf(sum(u.input_tokens), 0) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo

) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id

  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))

  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))

ORDER BY time

spec.title: /goal invocations over time
spec.description: Count of litellm calls made under the 'goal' slash command, bucketed by the Window variable. One /goal invocation spans many calls (one whole session), so this tracks call volume, not invocation count - see the table below for one row per invocation.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  count() AS value
FROM agent_events
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
WHERE command_name = 'goal'
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: /goal usage log
spec.description: One row per /goal invocation (= one session, since turn_id is currently always 0): who ran it, which session, how many LLM calls it took, total wall-clock duration, total tokens, total cost, and the goal text (the argument passed to /goal, i.e. the session's first prompt). Click the magnifier on 'goal text' to see the full text.

spec.rawSql:
WITH goal_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    session_id,
    min(timestamp) AS started_at,
    max(timestamp) AS last_call_at,
    count() AS calls,
    any(user_id) AS session_user_id,
    any(usr.user_name) AS session_user_name
  FROM agent_events
  LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = agent_events.session_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT user_id, argMax(user_name, updated_at) AS user_name
    FROM ai_gateway_users
    GROUP BY user_id
  ) usr ON usr.user_id = agent_events.user_id
  WHERE command_name = 'goal'
    AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id))
    AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], group_id))
    AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], agent_events.session_id))
    AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND ((has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') AND '$provider' = 'all') OR agent_events.session_id IN (
    SELECT session_id FROM agent_usage
    WHERE (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], model))
      AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  ))
  GROUP BY session_id
),
prompts AS (
  SELECT session_id, argMin(prompt_text, timestamp) AS prompt_text
  FROM agent_messages
  WHERE command_name = 'goal'
  GROUP BY session_id
),
usage AS (
  SELECT session_id, sum(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS tokens, sum(cost) AS cost
  FROM agent_usage
  GROUP BY session_id
)
SELECT
  gs.started_at AS timestamp,
  gs.session_user_id AS user,
  gs.session_user_name AS user_name,
  gs.session_id AS session,
  gs.calls AS "llm calls",
  round(dateDiff('second', gs.started_at, gs.last_call_at) / 60.0, 2) AS "duration (min)",
  coalesce(u.tokens, 0) AS tokens,
  coalesce(u.cost, 0) AS cost,
  p.prompt_text AS "goal text"
FROM goal_sessions gs
LEFT JOIN prompts p ON p.session_id = gs.session_id
LEFT JOIN usage u ON u.session_id = gs.session_id
ORDER BY gs.started_at DESC

spec.title: Spend by repo
spec.description: Total spend (USD) per git repo over the selected time range - a single ranked bar per repo, mirroring 'Spend by user' but for 'which repo is costing the most.'

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  coalesce(nullIf(gb.git_repo, ''), '(none - no repo captured)') AS git_repo,
  sum(u.cost) AS cost,
  sum((u.input_tokens - (1 - $include_cache_tokens) * (u.cache_creation_tokens + u.cache_read_tokens)) + u.output_tokens) AS tokens
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))
  AND (has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name))
GROUP BY git_repo
ORDER BY cost DESC

spec.title: Cost over time by repo
spec.description: Spend (USD) over time, one series per git repo - shows when a repo's work happened and whether spend is trending up or tapering off, not just the totals.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(u.timestamp, INTERVAL ${window} SECOND) AS time,
  coalesce(nullIf(gb.git_repo, ''), '(none - no repo captured)') AS metric,
  sum(u.cost) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, argMax(git_branch, captured_at) AS git_branch, argMax(git_repo, captured_at) AS git_repo
  FROM session_git_branch GROUP BY session_id
) gb ON gb.session_id = u.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND (has([${user_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id))
  AND (has([${group_id:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${group_id:singlequote}], u.group_id))
  AND (has([${model:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)) AND ('$provider' = 'all' OR ('$provider' = 'claude' AND match(u.model, '^claude-')) OR ('$provider' = 'openai' AND match(u.model, '^(gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')) OR ('$provider' = 'other' AND NOT match(u.model, '^(claude-|gpt-|chatgpt-|o[0-9]|text-embedding-|dall-e-|whisper|tts-)')))
  AND (has([${agent_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${agent_name:singlequote}], u.agent_name))
  AND (has([${skill_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${skill_name:singlequote}], u.skill_name))
  AND (has([${session_id:singlequote}], '') OR has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id))
  AND (has([${git_branch:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_branch:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_branch, ''))) AND (has([${git_repo:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${git_repo:singlequote}], coalesce(gb.git_repo, '')))
  AND (has([${command_name:singlequote}], '__all__') OR has([${command_name:singlequote}], u.command_name))

GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time
